vBRIEFInfo.description: Scope vBRIEF for #723: task build artifact filename must match the release version, not the stale Taskfile.yml literal.

plan.title: release: task build uses the actual release version (#723)

narratives.Overview: task release -- 0.21.0 produced dist/deft-0.20.0.zip during the v0.21.0 cut because Taskfile.yml var VERSION is hard-coded to 0.20.0 and never updated as part of CHANGELOG promotion. This vBRIEF replaces the literal with a dynamic resolver (DEFT_RELEASE_VERSION env > git describe --tags --abbrev=0 stripped of v > 0.0.0-dev) and has scripts/release.py:run_build set DEFT_RELEASE_VERSION when invoking task build so the dist/deft-{version}.{zip,tar.gz} filename always matches the requested release version.

narrative.Action: Create a small Python helper that prints the resolved version. Priority: DEFT_RELEASE_VERSION env var > git describe --tags --abbrev=0 (stripped of leading v) > 0.0.0-dev fallback. Cross-platform; no third-party deps.
narrative.Acceptance: Helper prints the env override when set, falls back to the latest annotated tag, and emits 0.0.0-dev when neither is available.

items.title: Replace Taskfile.yml literal VERSION with sh: invocation of resolve_version.py

narrative.Action: Change `vars.VERSION: 0.20.0` to an inline POSIX `sh:` block (run by go-task's embedded mvdan/sh interpreter so it works cross-platform on Windows/macOS/Linux without requiring uv/Python at parse time) that mirrors the resolver priority: $DEFT_RELEASE_VERSION env > `git describe --tags --abbrev=0` (stripped of leading v) > `0.0.0-dev` fallback. scripts/resolve_version.py mirrors the same priority for Python callers and regression tests; the Taskfile block does NOT invoke that script.
narrative.Acceptance: task build emits dist/deft-<resolved-version>.zip (or .tar.gz) and never references 0.20.0 unless that is the actual resolved version.

narrative.Action: Refactor run_build(project_root) → run_build(project_root, version) and propagate DEFT_RELEASE_VERSION=<version> via env when subprocess.run(['task', 'build']) so go-task's VERSION resolver picks up the in-flight release version.
narrative.Acceptance: task release -- 0.21.0 invokes task build with DEFT_RELEASE_VERSION=0.21.0; produced artifact is dist/deft-0.21.0.{zip,tar.gz}.

narrative.Action: Add tests/cli/test_resolve_version.py covering env override / git fallback / dev fallback. Augment tests/cli/test_release.py to assert run_build passes DEFT_RELEASE_VERSION through subprocess env.
narrative.Acceptance: Tests assert the three resolver paths and the env-propagation contract.

references.title: Issue #723: release: build artifact filename uses stale version (deft-0.20.0.zip during v0.21.0 cut)
Issue #721: canonical recovery anchor for the v0.21.0 cut session
